compiled_state.title: Document DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 rollback flag in ticket-cli-reference.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Story
564c-e391 — ticket CLI dispatcher init runs without spawning Python processes

## What to Implement
Update plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md to document the DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 environment variable:
- Flag name and syntax: DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1
- Effect: routes _ensure_initialized to the pre-refactor Python-backed path
- When to use: on regression/suspected performance bug in the bash-native path
- Deprecation plan: "scheduled for removal after 2 stable plugin releases with no reported issues"
- Observable behavior: stderr message when legacy path is active (add to implementation if not already present)

Also add a brief stderr log in _ensure_initialized when DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 is set:
```bash
echo "DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1: using Python-backed _ensure_initialized path" >&2
```

## File
- Modify: plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md
- Modify: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket (add stderr notice on legacy path)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ticket-cli-reference.md contains DSO_TICKET_LEGACY documentation
  Verify: grep -q 'DSO_TICKET_LEGACY' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md
- [ ] Documentation includes deprecation criteria
  Verify: grep -q 'deprecat\|removal' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md
- [ ] When DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 is set, a stderr notice is emitted
  Verify: DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 bash -c 'source plugins/dso/scripts/ticket; _ensure_initialized 2>&1' | grep -q 'DSO_TICKET_LEGACY'
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
